summary: Add test coverage for word_timestamps rejection in SSE streaming to prevent regression.
Run full e2e tests with --run-hardware to validate raw audio streaming configuration.
Update docstring to reflect that the test covers raw audio streaming with stream_format='audio'.
Improve error message for SSE callers when word_timestamps is used to suggest omitting it instead of referencing WebSocket.
Add integration test for SSE streaming with WAV format to confirm base64 chunk output.
